English: As a catalyst for self-reliance and health security, the strategy advances Kenya’s strategic interests regionally, riding on the goodwill of the President’s lead role as AU champion on Local Manufacturing.
Kiswahili: Maoni muhimu kutoka kwa uchanganuzi wa mazingira yanaonyesha mfumo ikolojia wa utengenezaji wa ndani uliogawanyika na changamoto mtambuka ambazo zinahusisha wizara na mashirika mengi, na hivyo kuzuia maendeleo kuelekea Huduma ya Afya kwa Wote.

English: Key insights from the landscape analysis indicate a fragmented local manufacturing ecosystem with cross-cutting challenges that span multiple ministries and agencies, limiting progress toward Universal Health Coverage.
Kiswahili: Maoni muhimu kutoka kwa uchanganuzi wa mazingira yanaonyesha mfumo ikolojia wa utengenezaji wa ndani uliogawanyika na changamoto mtambuka ambazo zinahusisha wizara na mashirika mengi, na hivyo kuzuia maendeleo kuelekea Huduma ya Afya kwa Wote.

English: The sector remains siloed across supply chain, research, regulation, trade, product development, financing, human capital, and health data systems, resulting in persistent vulnerability to import and donor dependency, geopolitical disruptions, and climate-related health threats.
Kiswahili: Sekta hii inasalia kuwa chini ya ugavi, utafiti, udhibiti, biashara, ukuzaji wa bidhaa, ufadhili, rasilimali watu, na mifumo ya data ya afya, na kusababisha hatari ya kudumu ya kuagiza na kutegemea wafadhili, usumbufu wa kijiografia, na matishio ya kiafya yanayohusiana na hali ya hewa.

English: Key imperatives include strengthening private sector-led Pharmaceutical Value Chain Level 3 manufacturing (final dosage/fill-finish), where a few manufacturers account for most local production, through enhanced government–private sector collaboration to align commercial sustainability with national socio-economic goals.
Kiswahili: Masharti muhimu ni pamoja na kuimarisha kiwango cha 3 cha Mnyororo wa Thamani wa Dawa unaoongozwa na sekta binafsi (kipimo cha mwisho/kumaliza kumaliza), ambapo wazalishaji wachache wanachangia uzalishaji mwingi wa ndani, kupitia ushirikiano ulioimarishwa wa serikali na sekta binafsi ili kuoanisha uendelevu wa kibiashara na malengo ya kitaifa ya kijamii na kiuchumi.

English: The strategy also emphasizes commercialization of locally manufactured vaccines through Kenya Biovax, contingent on PPB achieving ML-3 status.
Kiswahili: Mkakati huo pia unasisitiza ufanyaji biashara wa chanjo zinazotengenezwa nchini kupitia Kenya Biovax, ikitegemea PPB kupata hadhi ya ML-3.

English: Additional priorities include developing underexploited Pharmaceutical Value Chain Level 4 (API production) and Level 5 (R&D), which require advanced technology, specialized skills, and significant investment despite available government incentives.
Kiswahili: Vipaumbele vya ziada ni pamoja na kuendeleza Kiwango cha 4 cha Mnyororo wa Thamani ya Dawa (uzalishaji wa API) na Kiwango cha 5 (R&D), ambacho kinahitaji teknolojia ya hali ya juu, ujuzi maalum na uwekezaji mkubwa licha ya motisha zinazopatikana za serikali.

English: This further highlights the need for regional API supply-chain collaboration across Africa and calls for a dedicated strategy to strengthen the largely under-prioritized diagnostics and medical devices sector.
Kiswahili: Hii inaangazia zaidi hitaji la ushirikiano wa kikanda wa ugavi wa API kote barani Afrika na kutoa wito wa mkakati mahususi wa kuimarisha sekta ya uchunguzi na vifaa vya matibabu ambayo haijapewa kipaumbele kwa kiasi kikubwa.

English: Pivoting on three (3) strategic pillars i.e.
Kiswahili: Kuegemea kwenye nguzo tatu (3) za kimkakati i.e.

English: It also aims to demystify negative perspectives on LM industry’s unattractiveness for sustainable finance, by prioritizing and navigating complex regulatory environment, technology partnership, and building replicable operational models that meet international compliance standards.
Kiswahili: Pia inalenga kufifisha mitazamo hasi kuhusu kutovutia kwa sekta ya LM kwa fedha endelevu, kwa kuweka kipaumbele na kuabiri mazingira changamano ya udhibiti, ushirikiano wa teknolojia, na kujenga miundo ya utendakazi inayoweza kuigwa ambayo inakidhi viwango vya utiifu wa kimataifa.

English: This will de-risk the LM investment landscape and attract capital needed for infrastructure upgrades and foster private sector-led growth for supply stability, health security, and a future of shared prosperity for Kenya and Africa.
Kiswahili: Moja ya dharura ya muda mrefu ya darasa la 2 (Mpox, Clade 1b) na matukio mengine kadhaa ya kipaumbele yanaendelea, ikiwa ni pamoja na milipuko ya surua katika kaunti tatu, mafuriko yaliyoenea kutokana na mvua ndefu za MAM, na shida kubwa ya usalama wa chakula na lishe katika kaunti kame na nusu kame (ASAL).

English: One protracted Grade 2 emergency (Mpox, Clade 1b) and several other priority events are ongoing, including measles outbreaks in three counties, widespread flooding from the MAM long rains, and a severe food security and nutrition crisis in arid and semi-arid (ASAL) counties.
Kiswahili: Moja ya dharura ya muda mrefu ya darasa la 2 (Mpox, Clade 1b) na matukio mengine kadhaa ya kipaumbele yanaendelea, ikiwa ni pamoja na milipuko ya surua katika kaunti tatu, mafuriko yaliyoenea kutokana na mvua ndefu za MAM, na shida kubwa ya usalama wa chakula na lishe katika kaunti kame na nusu kame (ASAL).

English: Article 227 of the Constitution of Kenya requires that when a state organ or any other public entity contracts for goods or services, it shall do so in accordance with a system that is fair equitable transparent, competitive and cost effective.
Kiswahili: Kifungu cha 227 cha Katiba ya Kenya kinataka kwamba wakati chombo cha serikali au shirika lingine lolote la umma likiweka kandarasi za bidhaa au huduma, litafanya hivyo kwa mujibu wa mfumo ambao ni wa usawa wa uwazi, wenye ushindani na wa gharama nafuu.

English: Section 7(1) of the Public Procurement and Asset Disposal Act 2015, (The Act) states that the National Treasury established under section 11 of the Public Finance Management Act 2012 shall be responsible for Public Procurement and Asset Disposal Policy formulation.

English: NATIONAL TREASURY INITIATES TRANSITION TO ACCRUAL BASIS ACCOUNTING The National Treasury is pleased to announce the commencement of the transition from cash -basis accounting to the International Public Sector Accounting Standards (IPSAS) accrual basis, marking an important step in public financial management reform.
Kiswahili: HAZINA YA TAIFA YAANZISHA MAPITO YA UHASIBU WA MSINGI UTAYARISHAJI Hazina ya Kitaifa inafuraha kutangaza kuanza kwa mageuzi kutoka kwa uhasibu wa msingi wa fedha kwenda kwa viwango vya kimataifa vya uhasibu katika sekta ya umma (IPSAS), kuashiria hatua muhimu katika mageuzi ya usimamizi wa fedha za umma.

English: This transition will affect the National Government, County Governments, and their respective entities, ensuring greater transparency and accountability in financial reporting.

English: The Cabinet approved this transition on 7 thMarch,2024 following recommendations from the National Treasury and the Publi c Sector Accounting Standards Board (PSASB).

English: The Policy is underpinned on the Government’s commitment to address the challenges that have faced the Kenyan tax system for a long time.

English: As such this National Tax Policy identifies and analyses the challenges of the current tax regime and sets out broad policy guidelines to address these challenges thereby forming a basis for tax reforms and review of existing tax legislation.
